sentences.text: This booklet, The Son of God: An Introduction to Spiritual Genetics, is drawn from Chapter 1 of the larger work The Foundation of Spiritual Genetics.
If these pages have stirred something in you, continue the journey at bookofelisha.org.
A bespoke, Book-of-Elisha-trained AI that answers your questions on doctrine, Greek and Hebrew nuances, and practical discipleship—perfect for solo study or guiding a group.
Chat with the AI to explore the entire three-book framework before the next volume's release.
Preview advanced chapters, cross-references, and word studies before they appear in print.
Join Elisha’s weekly sessions (with real-time translation) or drop into 24/7 AI-led Bible study rooms where language barriers vanish, and believers connect instantly.
Visit bookofelisha.org to access the complete revelation now.
